title: erigeron inornatus var. biolettii
intro: Erigeron inornatus var. biolettii, also known as Biolett's fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Erigeron inornatus var. biolettii include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, or the plant can be used in salves and ointments to topically apply its medicinal properties.
